title: Floral Juicy Indian Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian curry featuring chicken, soda water, and pickle, with a blend of floral and spicy notes. This dish is perfect for those who love a good balance of flavors and textures.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the cumin, coriander, garam masala, turmeric, and red chili powder. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the soda water, yogurt, pickle juice, and salt. Stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
